title: Round Table Cradock 37 gives back to community through busy October projects
description: CRADOCK NEWS - The Round Table in Cradock is...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"CRADOCK NEWS - The Round Table in Cradock is looking back on a packed month of community service during October.","html":"CRADOCK NEWS - The Round Table in Cradock is looking back on a packed month of community service during October."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As part of its standard activities, the organisation collected clothes and non-perishable foods from the people of Cradock and donated them to three community-based charity organisations.","html":"As part of its standard activities, the organisation collected clothes and non-perishable foods from the people of Cradock and donated them to three community-based charity organisations."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Cradock Round Table 37 also served at three special events.","html":"Cradock Round Table 37 also served at three special events."},{"type":"heading","text":"Fish River Canoe Marathon","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On 10 October, at the Fish River Canoe Marathon, Round Table 37 hosted the beer tent and attracted many visitors with an ice-cold beer after completion of the rowing.","html":"On 10 October, at the Fish River Canoe Marathon, Round Table 37 hosted the beer tent and attracted many visitors with an ice-cold beer after completion of the rowing."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tablers were all present as hosts and live music was presented. Thanks to their great team work, the occasion was very successful.","html":"Tablers were all present as hosts and live music was presented. Thanks to their great team work, the occasion was very successful."},{"type":"heading","text":"Cancer walk","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On Saturday 18 October, Round Table supported the Cradock Cancer Organisation’s annual cancer walk.","html":"On Saturday 18 October, Round Table supported the Cradock Cancer Organisation’s annual cancer walk."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It was a meaningful day, with support from local businesses, and members of the community joined in significant numbers.","html":"It was a meaningful day, with support from local businesses, and members of the community joined in significant numbers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The event was impactful, with a happy social gathering afterwards.","html":"The event was impactful, with a happy social gathering afterwards."},{"type":"heading","text":"Adelaide: Vlakvark 500","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On 27 October, the Cradock Round Tablers joined their fellow Round Tablers in Adelaide during their massive Vlakvark 500 project.","html":"On 27 October, the Cradock Round Tablers joined their fellow Round Tablers in Adelaide during their massive Vlakvark 500 project."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“It was an eye-opening experience for our tablers. It was good to observe, help and learn from team Adelaide. Their dedication is laudable,” said media manager Lizwi Ndolomba."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This day ended with some great fellowship with other members of Round Table from the Eastern Province and other areas.","html":"This day ended with some great fellowship with other members of Round Table from the Eastern Province and other areas."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The EP team was led by the area chairperson, Daneel Meiring.","html":"The EP team was led by the area chairperson, Daneel Meiring."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Adelaide took extremely good care of all the visitors, showing great hospitality.","html":"Adelaide took extremely good care of all the visitors, showing great hospitality."},{"type":"heading","text":"Thanks","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Round Table Cradock 37 extends its appreciation to the community of Cradock for their kindness and generosity.","html":"Round Table Cradock 37 extends its appreciation to the community of Cradock for their kindness and generosity."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A special mention goes to Cradock Preparatory School and other organisations in town, whose hearts are in the development of our community, for their participation.","html":"A special mention goes to Cradock Preparatory School and other organisations in town, whose hearts are in the development of our community, for their participation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Looking back to the October month projects, Round Table Cradock 37 could pat themselves on the back for great assistance to the local community,” said chairperson Wium Hagen.","html":"“Looking back to the October month projects, Round Table Cradock 37 could pat themselves on the back for great assistance to the local community,” said chairperson Wium Hagen."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Round Table Cradock 37 gives back to community through busy October projects
